#  Compare Drawing Revisions 
##  Background 
Procore's drawing comparison feature allows users to see what has changed in a drawing by comparing it with another version. Drawing revisions can be compared individually, or as a set.
##  Things to Consider​ 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' or higher permissions on the project's Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * Drawings of different sizes cannot be compared.
    * Drawings can also be compared on Procore's mobile applications. See [Compare Drawings (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/compare-drawings-ios) and [Compare Drawings (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/compare-drawings-android).


##  Prerequisites 
  * To compare drawings, the drawings must have more than one revision uploaded in Procore. To see how to upload a drawing, see [Upload Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/user-guide-bidding-and-estimating-integration/upload-drawings). To see how to upload a new version of a drawing, see [Upload Drawing Revisions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/upload-drawing-revisions).


##  Steps 
Drawings can be compared individually, or as a set.
  * Compare Two Versions of a Drawing
  * Bulk Compare a Drawing Set to its Previous Version


#### Compare Two Versions of a Drawing
  1. Navigate to your project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. On the Drawings list page, click **Info** next to the drawing you want to compare versions for.
  3. Under the Versions section, click the **vertical ellipsis**![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) icon next to the drawing version you want to compare   
_Note_ : If you want to compare the current version with the previous version, click the vertical ellipsis for the previous version (see image below).  
![Drawing Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/2561395305c1a953801af3aeae17721e/430386246d8ef8975fdb8b7cc6fb0330/drawing-options-menu.png?fm=webp)
  4. Click **Compare to this version**.  
_Note_ : A drawing comparison mode opens that overlaps the two drawings and highlights the changes for you.  

![Compare Revisions 10.31.17](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1WSrZBFxwlpPbv4RFB2KyM/4e5cfa3ab0d94a838b51ac25b6aca612/compare_revisions_10.31.17.png?fm=webp)
  
_Note_ : Any items in the drawing that were removed between the old version and the newer version will appear in _red_. Any items in the drawing that were added to the new version will appear in _blue_.
  5. _Optional_ : Click **Download** to download the comparison.   
_Note_ : A PNG file will be downloaded to your computer.


#### Bulk Compare a Drawing Set to its Previous Version
When you compare a set of drawing revisions, a PDF file containing each drawing compared to its previous version is emailed to you.
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click **Drawing Sets**.  
_Note_ : If your project uses drawing areas, select a drawing area first. See [What are Drawing Areas?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-drawing-areas)
  3. Click the drawing set that contains the drawings you want to compare.
  4. Click **Compare Set**.  
_Note_ : If no previous revisions exist for drawings in the set, there will not be a drawing comparison.![2021 Compare Set](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/f215eb0c916ff55fe07b43ae5f0d32a8/34ebcaf4da99e4c570d7c3bfaa666084/2021-compare-set.png?fm=webp)
  5. A PDF file containing each drawing compared to its previous version is generated and emailed to you.  
_Note_ : Any items in the drawing that were removed between the old version and the newer version will appear in _red_. Any items in the drawing that were added to the new version will appear in _blue_.


## See Also
  * [Drawings - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/permissions)
  * [Why are my drawing comparisons failing?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-why-are-my-drawing-comparisons-failing)
  * [Should I enable the Specifications tool on my project?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-should-i-enable-the-specifications-tool-on-my-project)
title: Compare Drawing Revisions
description: How to compare revisions of drawings in the project's Drawings tool.
